name: Beauty Salon
author: Poki
description: Beauty Salon is a makeover game where you help a girl glow up from head to toe! Wash and dry her hair, treat her to a relaxing beauty routine, apply stunning makeup, create the perfect hairstyle, and pick the cutest outfit and accessories. Whether you're pampering for fun or prepping her for a beauty contest, it’s all about the glam! Ready to work your magic? How to play Beauty Salon? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to apply some actions. Who created Beauty Salon? Beauty Salon is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Brainrot Clicker , My Cozy Home , Anime Dress Up , Star Blogger: Left or Right , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Stickman Bike , Stickman Race , Tag , Tag 2 , and wall-jumper! How can I play Beauty Salon for free? You can play Beauty Salon for free on Poki. Can I play Beauty Salon on mobile devices and desktop? Beauty Salon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
